title: action_status
description: PROPOSED (Phase E / G1). Daemon -> client lifecycle for a motion-bearing control frame that carried an `action_id`. Transitions: accepted -> active -> done | blocked | clamped | timeout. Additive (no protocol_version bump): older clients ignore an unknown type. See docs/phase_e_action_completion.md.

state.description: accepted=received & valid; active=moving; done=settled within tolerance; blocked=stall latch / estop / thermal / watchdog-stop; clamped=target saturated a range/soft limit; timeout=no terminal state within the daemon's per-action deadline.

reason.description: Detail for a non-done terminal state, e.g. "stall:right_arm_elbow_flex", "estop:button", "clamp:right_arm_shoulder_pan".
